profiles.label: Malls, retail, and markets
profiles.source_search_prompt: Find incident reports with explicit headcounts for people physically present, trapped, rescued, or evacuated from malls, shopping centers, markets, supermarkets, groceries, stores, or retail buildings. Prioritize news articles, official emergency reports, regulator reports, and official press releases; treat directories, mall guides, map listings, capacity pages, and generic venue profiles as context only.
preferred_source_types: local or national news article
wire-service article
official emergency or public-safety incident report
official government or regulator enforcement report
official venue, organizer, or event attendance announcement
official press release with a count-bearing event or incident detail
context_only_source_types: Wikipedia or encyclopedia page
generic directory, travel guide, listicle, or map listing
venue marketing or about page without a count-bearing event or incident
capacity, seating-chart, annual-report, or statistics page
social media repost without an original authoritative source
residential building report
outdoor public open-space report without a named commercial facility

profiles.label: Offices, BPOs, and call centers
profiles.source_search_prompt: Find incident reports with explicit headcounts for employees, workers, call center agents, or occupants physically present, trapped, rescued, or evacuated from corporate offices, BPO offices, call centers, office towers, or business parks. Prioritize news articles, official emergency reports, labor/regulator reports, and official press releases; treat company profile pages, job listings, directories, and office leasing pages as context only.
preferred_source_types: local or national news article
wire-service article
official emergency or public-safety incident report
official government or regulator enforcement report
official venue, organizer, or event attendance announcement
official press release with a count-bearing event or incident detail
context_only_source_types: Wikipedia or encyclopedia page
generic directory, travel guide, listicle, or map listing
venue marketing or about page without a count-bearing event or incident
capacity, seating-chart, annual-report, or statistics page
social media repost without an original authoritative source
job listing or company profile without incident evidence
office leasing page without incident evidence
